commands.summary: [AC-1] Confirmed current Tauri 2 app environment before Android initialization attempt.
[AC-8] Confirmed OpenJDK 17.0.19 is available on the host.
[AC-8] Confirmed Android SDK has emulator, platform-tools, and Android 35 system image, but no registered NDK.
[AC-1] Android initialization blocked because Tauri reported the Android NDK was not found.
[AC-8] SDK package install failed after a connection reset while preparing CMake.
[AC-8] Retry created a partial NDK directory but did not register an installed package or produce source.properties.
[AC-1] Android init script now finds the partial NDK directory but fails because source.properties is missing.
[AC-4] Content validation passed for A+, Network+, and Security+ bundled banks before Android runtime proof.
[AC-6] Accessibility validation passed after phone-width CSS changes.
[AC-8] Unit tests passed: 65 tests across 3 files.
[AC-8] TypeScript and Vite production build passed.
[AC-8] Governance validation still fails on a repo-wide preflight-marker requirement affecting active, blocked, and completed work items; no unknown-evidence errors remain for 217.

environment.process_note: Repository-side Android foundation is present; Android target initialization, launch, persistence, offline-content runtime proof, backup document/share handoff, and APK output remain blocked by incomplete local Android NDK installation.
